entry.title: Add Widget to launcher
entry.content:
1️⃣In Android 5, Android 6, Android 7 system, Long press or pinch with two fingers on the empty space of your launcher.

Above Android 8+, long press the Folder Widget app icon, find New widget shortcut then click it.
OR
Open the Folder Widget app, tap the New widget button, then go to your phone homescreen.

2️⃣​ Find the widget added just now, and tap the name of widget text to config it.

see more 👉 How to use

FAQ

Q: why cant I find the widget?

A: Maybe your launcher not support widget feature, please try other nice launcher apps (such as Nova Launcher, Smart launcher)

entry.title: How to open notification dot
entry.summary:
Find the option

  1. open Folder Widget app
  2. click Settings
  3. find Notfication settings, and open then checkbox.
  4. Find Folder Widget app and allow the permission in new system page.
entry.content:
Find the option

  1. open Folder Widget app
  2. click Settings
  3. find Notfication settings, and open then checkbox.
  4. Find Folder Widget app and allow the permission in new system page.

OR

watch video https://www.youtube.com/shorts/-nR6blj8rDA

entry.title: How to use
entry.summary:
Quick start

1️⃣ Add widget to your launcher screen.
2️⃣ Tap the name of the widget to config apps for quick launch.

OR ▶️ Video tutorial
OR 👉 Twitter
entry.content:
Quick start

1️⃣ Add widget to your launcher screen.
2️⃣ Tap the name of the widget to config apps for quick launch.

OR ▶️ Video tutorial
OR 👉 Twitter

Add widget

To use Folder Widget, you need add the widget of app on your launcher.(if launcher is not support widget, please change other launcher app).

Add Widget to launcher

Configuration

Tap name of the widget to launch the configuration page.

Notification

see 👉 How to open notification

entry.title: Folder Widget
entry.summary: Folder Widget is a simple launcher widget which allow user create folder to put apps for quick launch.
entry.content:
Folder Widget is a simple launcher widget which allow user create folder to put apps for quick launch.

Features

⭐ custom widget size, backgroud color, radius, margins, paddings.
⭐ custom folder name, text color, text size, text paddings.
⭐ quick open system apps, quick search app for shortcuts.
⭐ adaptive icon shape.
⭐ support icon pack and mask.
⭐ folder name shadow option.
⭐ widget has 2x2 3x3 3+4 1x5 1x4 2x3 3x2 2x4 4x2 size.
⭐ new ui for configuration.
⭐ support hide folder name
